functional_requirements.requirement: Cameras monitor roads with high traffic levels to facilitate traffic signals.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: Cameras to monitor the roads with high traffic levels in order to facilitate the traffic signal.

functional_requirements.requirement: Helmet and seat belt detection using image processing warns drivers.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: Helmet and seat belt detection using image processing to warn the drivers.

functional_requirements.requirement: Details of driver are submitted to traffic police via number plate when violating law more than two times.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: Details of the driver are submitted to the traffic police, when he/she violates the law more than two times via the number plate which is captured by cameras.

functional_requirements.requirement: Street lights operate based on population density at night to save electricity.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: Street lights are operated based on the population density on road at night, thereby saving electricity.

functional_requirements.requirement: License is cancelled as penalty for violating law.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: License will be cancelled as penalty, if the law is violated.

functional_requirements.requirement: Details of driver are passed to successive signals on account of speeding.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: Details of the driver will be passed on to successive signals on account of speeding.

functional_requirements.requirement: Automated traffic lights regulate traffic flow to avoid congestions.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: Automated traffic lights regulate the traffic flow in order to avoid congestions

prompt:
You are a requirements engineer.
Extract functional software requirements from the source text.

Return ONLY valid JSON with this schema:
{
  "functional_requirements": [
    {
      "requirement": "string",
      "evidence_quote": "short exact quote from source text"
    }
  ]
}

Rules:
1. Include only system capabilities/behaviors.
2. Exclude background context, impact statements, problem motivation, and pure business goals.
3. Keep each requirement atomic and clear.
4. Preserve original meaning. Do not invent functionality.
5. If uncertain, keep the item but keep evidence_quote explicit.

Source text:
<<<
In our modern metropolitan city, people don’t follow the traffic rules. The outcome of it is unfortunate. In India, 64.4% of the total deaths are accounted by road accidents. As the automobiles get
revolutionized the number of vehicles keep increasing. Conventional traffic signals are not efficient
and strict. Smart traffic system aims in minimizing the risks of accidents by precautionary taking
actions on people who violate the traffic rules. Cameras to monitor the roads with high traffic
levels in order to facilitate the traffic signal. Helmet and seat belt detection using image processing
to warn the drivers. Details of the driver are submitted to the traffic police, when he/she violates
the law more than two times via the number plate which is captured by cameras. Street lights are
operated based on the population density on road at night, thereby saving electricity. License will
be cancelled as penalty, if the law is violated. Details of the driver will be passed on to successive
signals on account of speeding. Automated traffic lights regulate the traffic flow in order to avoid
congestions (Figures 21.1–21.8)
>>>
